title: Better Visible Barriers
description: This small resource pack improves the textures from the Visible Barriers mod.
body:
This small resource pack improves the textures from the **Visible Barriers** mod!

**IMPORTANT!!!**

**This recource pack requires the [Visible Barriers](https://modrinth.com/mod/visiblebarriers) mod by [AmyMialee's Mods](https://modrinth.com/organization/amymialeesmods)!!**
